description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, upright rectangular structure with a slightly angled front face, typical of classic arcade machines. The cabinet is adorned with vibrant, neon-themed artwork, including a mix of retro graphics, text, and geometric patterns in shades of purple, blue, pink, and green. The front panel houses a display screen, a control panel with two joysticks and multiple buttons, and a coin slot area below. The side panels are heavily decorated with stylized graphics and text, contributing to a visually striking, cyberpunk-inspired aesthetic. The top section includes a marquee with illuminated artwork and the game's title, enhancing its presence in an urban entertainment setting. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and trim.
description: A neon-themed, upright arcade game cabinet with vibrant side graphics, a marquee, and a control panel featuring joysticks and buttons. The cabinet is visually striking with retro, cyberpunk-inspired artwork and illuminated display areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with two joysticks and buttons, coin slot, and the illuminated marquee with game title.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extensive neon artwork, text, and graphics covering the side panel, with the cabinet's depth and angled front visible.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the mostly plain black panel with some visible edge artwork and a small access panel, less detailed than the left side.
description_view_3: Three-quarter front-left view emphasizing both the control panel and the vibrant side graphics, offering a dynamic perspective of the cabinet's design.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple round buttons arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay, with a dark panel and colored button tops
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features bright, neon-colored artwork with the game title in bold, stylized text and a retro-futuristic theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels are covered with vibrant, neon-themed graphics, including geometric patterns, stylized text, and retro imagery in purple, blue, green, and pink hues
